allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d.get\('status'\), '| filas:', len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\), '| primera fila:', d.get\('data',[[]]\)[0][:3] if d.get\('data'\) else 'vacío'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(b['name']\) for b in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d.get\('content',{}\).get\('name','ERROR'\), '| commit:', d.get\('commit',{}\).get\('sha',''\)[:12] if d.get\('commit'\) else d.get\('message',''\)\)")
